changeSet.author: openelis-pathology
changeSet.comment: Remove Reference & SOP Module page from Pathology Laboratory notebook
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page_sample WHERE notebook_page_id IN ( SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND np.title = 'Reference & SOP Module' );

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'PATHOLOGY' AND name = 'Reference & SOP Module'

changeSet.comment: Remove Reference & SOP Module workflow template for Pathology
